page.storeSelectorHint: Switch to timekeeping for another store

toasts.loadTodayFailed: Unable to load today's timekeeping status.
toasts.gpsNotSupported: Your browser does not support GPS geolocation.
toasts.getLocationFailed: Unable to get your current location. Please enable GPS/Location for your browser.
toasts.tooFarForCheckIn: You are too far from the store to check in with GPS. Please try again.
toasts.checkInFailed: Unable to check in. Please try again.
toasts.tooFarForCheckOut: You are too far from the store to check out with GPS. Please try again.
toasts.checkOutFailed: Unable to check out. Please try again.

map.title: Store map (OpenStreetMap)
map.subtitle: The store location is used to validate distance when you timekeep via GPS. You can update coordinates in Store settings.
map.missingStoreGps: Store GPS coordinates are not set. Go to Dashboard > Settings and update GPS Location to see the map here and enable distance validation.
map.distanceLabel: Current distance from you to the store:

selfie.title: Timekeeping selfie
selfie.hint: Choose a face photo (JPEG/PNG/WebP, max 5MB). It will be sent with check-in to ensure the right person and shift.

actions.title: Timekeeping actions
actions.hint: The system uses your current GPS location. Please allow Location access when prompted.

monthly.title: Monthly timekeeping report
monthly.hint: Select month/year and click "View" to see the monthly timekeeping report.
